title: tzvelevopyrethrum turcomanicum
intro: Tzvelevopyrethrum turcomanicum, also known as Tzvelev's pyrethrum or Turkmen pyrethrum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its pyrethrin content, a group of compounds that have been used to repel insects and treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tzvelevopyrethrum turcomanicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, wounds, and skin conditions.
